_comment: CALTEX MD Bot - Pterodactyl Egg Configuration
name: CALTEX MD WhatsApp Bot
author: Caltex254
description: CALTEX MD - Powerful WhatsApp Multi-Device Bot with AI, Plugin System, Web Dashboard & REST API. Uses Node.js + tsx runtime with Baileys for WhatsApp connection.
startup: if [ ! -d node_modules ]; then npm install --no-audit --no-fund; fi && npx tsx index.ts

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# CALTEX MD Bot - Pterodactyl Installation Script
# The bot files are uploaded directly by the user, no installation needed.
# Dependencies are installed at startup via npm install.

apt update
apt install -y git

# If package.json doesn't exist, clone the repo
if [ ! -f /mnt/server/package.json ]; then
    echo "Cloning CALTEX-MD repository..."
    git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Caltex254/CALTEX-MD.git /tmp/caltex
    cp -r /tmp/caltex/mini-services/caltex-bot/* /mnt/server/
    cp -r /tmp/caltex/mini-services/caltex-bot/.* /mnt/server/ 2>/dev/null || true
    rm -rf /tmp/caltex
fi

echo "Installation complete. Bot files are ready."
echo "Dependencies will be installed on first startup via npm install."

variables.name: Bot Session ID
variables.description: Your CALTEX-XXXX-XXXX session ID from the pairing dashboard. Required for auto-connecting without QR code.

variables.name: Bot Owner Phone
variables.description: Phone number of the bot owner (international format, no + or spaces). Example: 254104906247

variables.name: GitHub Token
variables.description: GitHub personal access token for credential storage (used to restore WhatsApp session across restarts).

variables.name: GitHub Repo Owner
variables.description: GitHub username or org that owns the caltex-sessions repo.

variables.name: GitHub Repo Name
variables.description: Name of the private GitHub repo where WhatsApp credentials are stored.

variables.name: Command Prefix
variables.description: Prefix for bot commands. Use '.' for .menu, .ping etc.

variables.name: Auto Read Messages
variables.description: Automatically mark incoming messages as read.

variables.name: Auto Typing
variables.description: Show typing indicator when processing messages.

variables.name: Anti Link
variables.description: Delete messages containing links in groups.
